channel.title: Explain Error Plugin on Xianpeng Shen
channel.description: Recent content in Explain Error Plugin on Xianpeng Shen
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2017–2025 Xianpeng Shen. All rights reserved.

item.title: Explain Error Plugin Major Update — AI Auto-Fix, Usage Management, and More AI Providers
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: The Explain Error Plugin has recently received several important updates: AI Auto-Fix for automatically creating fix PRs, usage statistics and quota management, and added support for four new AI providers: DeepSeek, Qwen, Azure OpenAI, and Custom Okta.

item.title: Explain Error Plugin Adds Two Major Enterprise Features—Custom Context and Folder-Level Configuration
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: The Explain Error Plugin introduces two significant updates: support for custom context information and folder-level AI provider configurations. These two features make the plugin more flexible and robust for use in enterprise environments.

item.title: Jenkins Explain Error Plugin Now Supports Ollama! 🤖
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: This article introduces the new feature of Jenkins Explain Error Plugin, which is the support for Ollama local models, helping users more efficiently analyze and resolve build errors.

item.title: Jenkins Explain Error Plugin Now Supports Google Gemini! 🤖
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: This article introduces a new feature of the Jenkins Explain Error Plugin that supports for Google Gemini model for error analysis. It provides configuration methods and an example video.

item.title: Jenkins Plugin Center Didn't Have an AI Plugin Yet? I Wrote One! 🤖
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: Introducing my first Jenkins plugin: Explain Error Plugin. It automatically analyzes build failure log information and generates readable error explanations, helping developers locate and solve problems faster.
